data.title: Tom Lee: The market will experience a decline followed by a rebound in 2026, and Bitcoin is expected to reach a new all-time high.
data.description: In an interview, Tom Lee stated that the cryptocurrency and stock markets will experience a sharp decline in 2026 due to geopolitical tensions, tariff risks, and political divisions. Lee predicts a potential 15% to 20% correction in the US stock market this year, but expects a strong rebound by the end of the year as the Federal Reserve shifts to a dovish stance and quantitative tightening ends. Regarding Bitcoin, Lee still anticipates it will reach a new all-time high this year, which he believes will be a key milestone in the market's complete recovery from the deleveraging event of October 10th. Lee pointed out that energy, basic materials, and gold are high-quality asset allocations in 2026, while the AI ​​and blockchain industries will continue to benefit from growth dividends. Furthermore, Benjamin Cowen, CEO of Into The Cryptoverse, expressed a similar view, believing that metals may once again outperform cryptocurrencies in 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin crashes to $86K as gold approaches $5,000 and US stocks see worst performance since October
data.description:
Bitcoin just tanked $2,000 in minutes, now sitting at $86,888 after over $360 million in leveraged longs got liquidated. That’s a 9% drop in 48 hours. Gold is now at $4,820 and still climbing fast. It’s getting close to the $5,000 mark as traders pile in.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-crashes-to-86000/

data.title: U.S. stocks closed sharply lower, with the three major indexes plummeting and the cryptocurrency sector also experiencing a significant drop. Strategy (MSTR) fell 7.76%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 1.76%, the S&P 500 fell 2.06%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 2.39%. The crypto sector generally saw a pullback, with SharpLink down 9.59%, Bitmine down 9.37%, Solana down 7.88%, Strategy (MSTR) down 7.76%, Circle down 7.52%, and Coinbase down 5.57%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Baseten Secures $300 Million Funding, Valuation Reaches $5 Billion
data.description:
Baseten, a startup specializing in artificial intelligence inference, has successfully raised $300 million in funding, according to ChainCatcher. The Wall Street Journal, citing informed sources, reported that the company's valuation has now reached $5 billion, nearly doubling its previous valuation.

The funding round was led by venture capital firm IVP and Alphabet's independent growth fund, CapitalG. Chip giant Nvidia also participated in the investment, contributing $150 million as part of the deal. This transaction highlights Nvidia's strategic focus on startups within the AI inference sector.

As the industry's focus shifts from training models to large-scale operations and inference—where AI models generate outputs based on inputs—Nvidia is increasing its investments in related startups while continuing to support its AI chip clientele.

data.title: Asset Manager SkyBridge Prepares For Choppy Markets, Keeps Faith In Bitcoin
data.description:
SkyBridge is leaning further into macro trades as policy uncertainty fuels market volatility, a shift Scaramucci said has helped the firm’s performance.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/skybridge-prepares-choppy-markets-keeps-faith-in-bitcoin/

data.title: OpenAI deploys AI age prediction model to restrict teenagers' access to ChatGPT
data.description: OpenAI announced that it has begun deploying an AI-based age prediction system designed to identify ChatGPT users under the age of 18 and automatically enforce content restrictions. The system assesses a user's age by analyzing signals such as account duration, activity time, and behavioral patterns, rather than relying solely on the birth date provided at registration. Accounts identified as belonging to minors will be subject to strict restrictions on violent and sexually sensitive content. OpenAI stated that if an adult user is wrongly identified, they can restore access by uploading a selfie or identification document through the third-party service Persona to complete age verification. Additionally, the update includes new parental controls, allowing parents to set quiet periods and receive notifications when the system detects serious emotional distress in their children. The system is currently available in the ChatGPT consumer program and is expected to roll out in the EU in the coming weeks.

data.title: Trend Research recently transferred 70 million USDT to Binance to purchase 24,555 ETH, and currently has a floating loss of $163 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, Trend Research transferred 70 million USDT to Binance in the past 24 hours, subsequently purchasing 24,555 ETH and withdrawing them to the blockchain, worth $75.54 million. Currently, Trend Research (16090b03...) holds a total of 651,300 ETH, with a total value of $1.92 billion, an average holding price of approximately $3,180, and a current unrealized loss of approximately $163 million.

data.title: OpenAI Introduces AI-Based Age Prediction System for ChatGPT
data.description:
OpenAI has announced the deployment of an AI-based age prediction system designed to identify ChatGPT users under the age of 18 and automatically enforce content restrictions. According to Odaily, the system evaluates user age by analyzing signals such as account duration, active hours, and behavior patterns, rather than relying solely on the birth date provided during registration. Accounts identified as belonging to teenagers will face strict limitations on violent and sexually sensitive content. OpenAI stated that adult users mistakenly identified as minors can verify their age through a third-party service, Persona, by uploading a selfie or identification document to regain access.

Additionally, the update includes new parental control features, allowing parents to set quiet hours and receive notifications if the system detects significant emotional distress in their children. This system is currently available in the ChatGPT consumer plan and is expected to be launched in the European Union in the coming weeks.

data.title: Grayscale Seeks to Convert Near Trust into ETF
data.description: Grayscale has submitted an S-1 filing to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, aiming to transform its Grayscale Near Trust into an ETF. According to Foresight News, the trust's shares are currently traded on the OTCQB market under the ticker "GSNR." Once the registration statement attached to its prospectus becomes effective, the trust plans to list these shares on the NYSE Arca, maintaining the same ticker symbol "GSNR."

data.title: AINFT Project Releases MiCA White Paper to Align with Global Regulatory Standards
data.description: The AINFT project has officially released its MiCA white paper to establish a blockchain AI ecosystem that meets international regulatory standards. According to Odaily, this document is now available on the project's official website, alongside previously released technical white papers in English and Korean. This initiative signifies AINFT's commitment to integrating a global regulatory framework into its development foundation. The goal is to set a standardized and transparent compliance base for a sustainable artificial intelligence ecosystem on the TRON network, promoting orderly and regulated industry advancement.

data.title: Market Downturn Leads to Complete Liquidation of Major Trader's Position
data.description:
According to Odaily, data from Hyperbot indicates that amid a continued market decline, the long position of a trader known as 麻吉大哥 (0x020c...5872) was fully liquidated. Following this, the trader reopened a long position with 600 ETH, valued at approximately $1.762 million, with an average opening price of $2941.68 and a leverage of 22.84 times.

Currently, the account has no available margin, with a total loss of $4.3 million over the past week, bringing the total account loss to $22.83 million. The current liquidation price for the position is $2865.54.

data.title: AINFT officially releases MiCA white paper
data.description: According to official sources, the AINFT project has officially released the MiCA white paper to build a blockchain AI ecosystem that complies with international regulatory standards. The document is now available on the project's official website, displayed alongside previously released English and Korean versions of the technical white paper. This move signifies that AINFT has deeply integrated a global regulatory framework into its development foundation, aiming to lay a standardized and transparent compliance foundation for a sustainable AI ecosystem based on the TRON network, and continuously drive the industry towards a more standardized and orderly evolution.

data.title: Mutual Funds Face Challenges Despite Strong Performance
data.description:
Eric Balchunas, senior ETF Analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, posted on X that mutual funds, despite being potentially suitable for private company exposure, are experiencing outflows. This trend persists even as these funds perform exceptionally well. In contrast, the $RONB fund has attracted $90 million in just one month, highlighting a shift in investor preference.

Balchunas also noted the growing interest in thematically appropriate ETFs incorporating private company exposure as part of their strategy. He predicts that within two years, numerous ETFs will adopt this approach, reflecting a significant trend in the investment landscape. The mention of $XOVR and $AGIX further underscores the evolving dynamics in the market.

data.title: European Stock Index Futures Decline
data.description: European stock index futures experienced a downturn, with the Euro Stoxx 50 and Germany's DAX index futures both falling by 0.4%. According to ChainCatcher, this decline reflects broader market trends impacting major European indices.

data.title: CFTC Chairman Selig Advocates for Stable Crypto Regulations
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump's newly appointed Chairman of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), Mike Selig, has announced plans to establish a regulatory framework for the cryptocurrency industry. According to ChainCatcher, Selig aims to create rules that will provide long-term protection for crypto assets and other financial innovations, ensuring they are not easily overturned in the future.

In an article published on social media platform X and in The Washington Post on Tuesday, Selig stated that the CFTC will move away from its current practice of enforcement-based regulation. Instead, it will develop tailored rules for emerging markets like digital assets to maintain the global competitiveness of U.S. financial markets. He noted that the digital asset economy has grown from a novelty to a market valued at approximately $3 trillion. While specific regulatory details have not yet been disclosed, Selig mentioned that more policy adjustments will be announced in the coming days. Additionally, an Innovation Advisory Committee will be established to provide guidance on financial innovations, including crypto assets, prediction markets, and perpetual contracts.

Selig emphasized that regulatory policies formed through formal rule-making processes are more stable and less likely to be overturned by future administrations compared to informal guidance. On the same day, the CFTC also announced the hiring of crypto attorney Michael Passalacqua to assist with related efforts. Analysts suggest that this stance aligns with the Trump administration's overall supportive position on crypto innovation, indicating that the CFTC may become one of the most crucial regulatory bodies for the U.S. crypto market in the future.

data.title: Europe's Significant Role in U.S. Debt Financing Amid Greenland Tensions
data.description: Europe possesses nearly $8 trillion in U.S. Treasuries, bonds, and equities, positioning it as a vital contributor to U.S. debt financing. According to NS3.AI, there are growing concerns that U.S. President Donald Trump's interest in Greenland could trigger a substantial sell-off by European investors. Such a move could destabilize U.S. assets and elevate political risk premiums. This scenario underscores the U.S.'s reliance on foreign investors to finance its deficits, potentially diminishing its influence in geopolitical matters such as the Greenland issue.

data.title: Gold Surges in 2025 Amid Tariff Uncertainty; Bitcoin and Oil Prices Decline
data.description: In 2025, gold experienced a significant increase of 62.6% as a result of uncertainty caused by tariffs. According to NS3.AI, oil prices fell by 21.5% due to decreased demand, while Bitcoin saw a decline of 6.4%. Despite Bitcoin's stagnation, Digital Asset Treasury Companies invested nearly $50 billion, substantially increasing their holdings and concentration of Bitcoin and Ethereum. This institutional accumulation, occurring amid liquidity constraints, indicates a strong conviction and sets the stage for a potential rebound in the crypto market in 2026.

data.title: Intel's Stock Surge and AI Partnership with Nvidia Fuel Optimism
data.description: Intel's stock has experienced a remarkable increase of over 130% in the past year, driven by new chip launches and a strategic partnership with Nvidia in artificial intelligence. According to NS3.AI, analysts are optimistic about continued growth, with several firms, including Seaport Research and HSBC, significantly raising Intel's price targets. This optimism is largely based on anticipated strong growth in server CPUs, fueled by rising AI demand. Intel's forthcoming Q4 2025 earnings report is eagerly awaited, as it may confirm these positive forecasts and further impact market sentiment.

data.title: Forecast market weekly fees exceeded $2.7 million, setting a new record.
data.description: According to Dune data, prediction market revenue exceeded $2.7 million in a single week, setting a new record. The opinion market accounted for 54.3% of this, while Polymarket's 15-minute price fluctuation market generated $787,000 in revenue, representing 28.4% of total revenue.

data.title: DeepSeek Unveils New Model 'MODEL1' on Anniversary of DeepSeek-R1
data.description: On January 21, DeepSeek marked the first anniversary of DeepSeek-R1 by revealing details about its new model, 'MODEL1.' According to BlockBeats, the company updated its FlashMLA code on GitHub, highlighting 28 mentions of MODEL1 across 114 files. This model appears alongside V32, indicating it is distinct from DeepSeek-V3.2. The differences in the code are evident in areas such as KV cache layout, sparsity handling, and FP8 decoding, with several optimizations in memory management.
